allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; Write-Host "--- AI Service Health ---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8001/health -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; Write-Host "`n--- Backend Health ---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8081/swagger-ui/index.html -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; Write-Host "`n--- Frontend ---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:5174 -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; docker compose ps --format "table {{.Service}}`t{{.Status}}" 2>&1 | Select-String -NotMatch "obsolete"; Write-Host "`n--- AI ---"; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8001/health -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Host "`n--- Frontend ---"; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:5174 -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode)
